raw.subject: Your Omaha page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed your commitment to helping Omaha drivers 'See Clearly & Drive Confidently!' with headlight restoration services. Your team's attention to detail is impressive.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which means you might be missing opportunities for potential customers to learn more about your services and book appointments.

I sketched up a simple homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a services overview section, a photo gallery to showcase your work, and a contact section with your address and phone number. I also included a map and hours section to make it easy for customers to find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-designated-detailer-llc-mobile-detailing-omaha

Let's discuss how to bring this online presence to life with a straightforward project and a flat fee for local businesses. I'd love to get the details right and set up a quick call to explore this further.
